name: No police report for my minor construction cut in Murray—still claimable?

mainEntity.name: No police report for my minor construction cut in Murray—still claimable?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, employer incident report and medicals suffice for workers' comp/third-party.** Police not always involved[3]. **Key factors:** 1. Supervisor log. 2. Photos/eyewitness notes. 3. Doctor records. 4. Timely report. File anyway. Lawyer builds case sans police.
